parents.subject: LU-13047 wbc: mkdir with excl root WBC EX lock return to client

commit.subject: LU-13047 wbc: obtain the WBC state of a file or directory
commit.message:
LU-13047 wbc: obtain the WBC state of a file or directory

This patch implements LL_IOC_WBC_STATE IOCTL and llapi to obtain
WBC state of a file or directory.

Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ic89336c6dba24380137a70f6a428dcde312c693c
